channel.title: Azure Arc-Enabled Kubernetes on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Azure Arc-Enabled Kubernetes on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager for Arc-enabled clusters
item.description:
Azure Kubernetes Fleet Manager is now generally available for Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters. This adds support for managing Arc-enabled clusters in Fleet Manager, extending centralized Kubernetes fleet operations across hybrid and multi-cloud environments.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Monitor Prometheus community recommended alerts for Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes
item.description:
Azure Monitor now lets you enable Prometheus recommended alerts with one click in the Azure Portal for Azure Arc-enabled Kubernetes clusters. The alerts are based on enhanced Prometheus community rules and expand monitoring coverage for cluster scenarios.

  • Source: Azure Updates
